title: Fantastic Flora
description: Makes flowers look nicer and more like their real-life counterparts
body:
Fantastic Flora updates/tweaks/redesigns flowers and other plants to be more faithful to their real-life appearance, as well as generally to look nicer.

   - Dandelions have more defined petals and look... familiar?
   - Tulips' have been reshaded
   - Oxeye Daisies have more defined petals
   - Alliums have leaves, as they do IRL
   - Azure Bluets have an updated shape
   - Blue Orchids remade with clearly defined flowers
   - Lily of the Valleys' flowers reflect their IRL appearance better
   - Cornflowers look like flowers
   - Sunflower textures have been reshaded and given new shapes
   - Glow Lichen looks more like lichen, and has better contrast against stone.
   - Wither Rose is extra rosy 


Credit to [I_am_Merp](https://modrinth.com/user/I_am_Merp) for the Sunflower model and front texture, from [Brush-Up!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brush-up)
(also, use Fantastic Flora with Brush-Up! for pixel consistent and texture-updated flower pots!)
